sys_script_include.name: TableWidgetV2

sys_update_version.name: sys_script_include_cd4f779e93ad071040fcb6597bba1024
sys_update_version.payload:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?><record_update table="sys_script_include"><sys_script_include action="INSERT_OR_UPDATE"><access>package_private</access><active>true</active><api_name>x_680259_scm.TableWidgetV2</api_name><caller_access/><client_callable>false</client_callable><description/><mobile_callable>false</mobile_callable><name>TableWidgetV2</name><sandbox_callable>false</sandbox_callable><script><![CDATA[const TableWidgetV2 = Class.create();
TableWidgetV2.prototype = {
    initialize: function (params) {
        this.transactionId = params.transactionId || gs.generateGUID();
        this.tableProviderScriptInclude = params.tableProviderScriptInclude;
        this.params = params || {};

        this.logger = new Logger({
            transactionId: this.transactionId,
            source: this.type,
            includeTimeStamp: true,
            includeUserInfo: true,
            includeSessionId: true,
        });

        this.provider = this._initializeProvider();
    },

    canCreate: function () {
        return this._invokeProviderMethod("canCreate", [], false);
    },

    canFilter: function () {
        return this._invokeProviderMethod("canFilter", [], false);
    },

    canSavePreferences: function () {
        return this._invokeProviderMethod("canSavePreferences", [], false);
    },

    canConfigureColumns: function () {
        return this._invokeProviderMethod("canConfigureColumns", [], true);
    },

    getAllAvailableColumns: function () {
        return this._invokeProviderMethod("getAllAvailableColumns", [], []);
    },

    getAppliedFiltersInfoMessage: function (appliedFilters = []) {
        return this._invokeProviderMethod(
            "getAppliedFiltersInfoMessage",
            [appliedFilters],
            "",
        );
    },

    getBreadcrumbs: function () {
        return this._invokeProviderMethod("getBreadcrumbs", [], []);
    },

    getChoiceValues: function (fieldName) {
        return this._invokeProviderMethod("getChoiceValues", [fieldName], []);
    },

    getDefaultColumns: function () {
        return this._invokeProviderMethod("getDefaultColumns", [], []);
    },

    getDetailViewPage: function () {
        return this._invokeProviderMethod("getDetailViewPage", [], "error-404");
    },

    getFilterFields: function () {
        return this._invokeProviderMethod("getFilterFields", [], []);
    },

    getIdField: function () {
        return this._invokeProviderMethod("getIdField", [], "sys_id");
    },

    getOrderBy: function () {
        return this._invokeProviderMethod("getOrderBy", [], "");
    },

    getOrderDirection: function () {
        return this._invokeProviderMethod("getOrderDirection", [], "ASC");
    },

    getPageTitle: function () {
        return this._invokeProviderMethod("getPageTitle", [], "");
    },

    getTableColumns: function () {
        return this._invokeProviderMethod("getTableColumns", [], []);
    },

    getTableData: function ({ filters = [], page = 1 }) {
        return this._invokeProviderMethod(
            "getTableData",
            [{ filters: filters, page: page }],
            [],
        );
    },

    getTableLimit: function () {
        return this._invokeProviderMethod("getTableLimit", [], 10);
    },

    getTotalRecords: function (filters = []) {
        return this._invokeProviderMethod("getTotalRecords", [filters], 0);
    },

    saveUserPreference: function (preferenceName, preferenceValue) {
        this._invokeProviderMethod(
            "saveUserPreference",
            [preferenceName, preferenceValue],
            null,
        );
    },

    showAppliedFilters: function () {
        return this._invokeProviderMethod("showAppliedFilters", [], true);
    },

    showTableMetadata: function () {
        return this._invokeProviderMethod("showTableMetadata", [], true);
    },

    _initializeProvider: function () {
        if (
            !this.tableProviderScriptInclude ||
            typeof this.tableProviderScriptInclude !== "string"
        ) {
            this.logger.error({
                method: "_initializeProvider",
                message: "Invalid tableProviderScriptInclude",
                tableProviderScriptInclude: this.tableProviderScriptInclude,
            });
            throw new Error("Invalid tableProviderScriptInclude");
        }

        if (!/^[A-Za-z0-9_.$]+$/.test(this.tableProviderScriptInclude)) {
            this.logger.error({
                method: "_initializeProvider",
                message: "Unsafe provider Script Include name",
                tableProviderScriptInclude: this.tableProviderScriptInclude,
            });
            throw new Error("Unsafe provider Script Include name");
        }

        const ProviderClass = this._resolveProviderClass(
            this.tableProviderScriptInclude,
        );

        if (typeof ProviderClass !== "function") {
            this.logger.error({
                method: "_initializeProvider",
                message: "Provider Script Include not found",
                tableProviderScriptInclude: this.tableProviderScriptInclude,
            });
            throw new Error("Provider Script Include not found");
        }

        try {
            return new ProviderClass({
                transactionId: this.transactionId,
                tableProviderScriptInclude: this.tableProviderScriptInclude,
                providerParams: this.params.providerParams,
            });
        } catch (error) {
            this.logger.error({
                method: "_initializeProvider",
                message: "Error initializing provider",
                error: error.message,
                tableProviderScriptInclude: this.tableProviderScriptInclude,
            });
            throw error;
        }
    },

    _invokeProviderMethod: function (methodName, args, fallback) {
        if (!this.provider || typeof this.provider[methodName] !== "function") {
            this.logger.warn({
                method: "_invokeProviderMethod",
                message: "Provider method not implemented",
                provider: this.tableProviderScriptInclude,
                providerMethod: methodName,
            });
            return fallback;
        }

        try {
            return this.provider[methodName].apply(this.provider, args || []);
        } catch (error) {
            this.logger.error({
                method: "_invokeProviderMethod",
                message: "Error executing provider method",
                provider: this.tableProviderScriptInclude,
                providerMethod: methodName,
                error: error.message,
            });
            return fallback;
        }
    },

    _resolveProviderClass: function (providerName) {
        try {
            const scopeName = gs.getCurrentScopeName();
            const apiName =
                providerName.indexOf(".") !== -1
                    ? providerName
                    : scopeName + "." + providerName;

            const gr = new GlideRecord("sys_script_include");
            gr.addQuery("api_name", apiName);
            gr.setLimit(1);
            gr.query();

            if (!gr.next()) {
                this.logger.error({
                    method: "_resolveProviderClass",
                    message: "Script Include record not found",
                    apiName: apiName,
                });
                return null;
            }

            const evaluator = new GlideScopedEvaluator();
            return evaluator.evaluateScript(gr, "script");
        } catch (error) {
            this.logger.error({
                method: "_resolveProviderClass",
                message: "Error resolving provider class",
                providerName: providerName,
                error: error.message,
            });
            return null;
        }
    },

    type: "TableWidgetV2",
};
]]></script><sys_class_name>sys_script_include</sys_class_name><sys_created_by>admin</sys_created_by><sys_created_on>2026-06-20 21:08:17</sys_created_on><sys_id>cd4f779e93ad071040fcb6597bba1024</sys_id><sys_mod_count>4</sys_mod_count><sys_name>TableWidgetV2</sys_name><sys_package display_value="SCM" source="x_680259_scm">9b70ffe7836a2650efda54b6feaad334</sys_package><sys_policy>read</sys_policy><sys_scope display_value="SCM">9b70ffe7836a2650efda54b6feaad334</sys_scope><sys_update_name>sys_script_include_cd4f779e93ad071040fcb6597bba1024</sys_update_name><sys_updated_by>admin</sys_updated_by><sys_updated_on>2026-06-20 21:31:39</sys_updated_on></sys_script_include></record_update>
